name: security-performance-test-review-board
summary: 4 parallel Sonnet specialists review the same diff from different angles, Opus synth produces the final verdict.
when_to_use: PR review where discipline specialists are cheaper per issue caught than a generalist reviewer.

composition.focus: OWASP, auth, secrets, injection, authz, crypto misuse
N+1 queries, O(n²), cache invalidation, memory leaks, bundle size
coverage gaps, flaky patterns, test quality, missing edge cases
naming, dead code, comments, consistency with existing patterns

file_ownership.specialists: each writes .claude/reviews/{role}.md — one section per finding (severity, location, suggested fix)
file_ownership.synthesizer: reads all 4; writes .claude/reviews/VERDICT.md with dedupe + severity ranking + block/nit/ok verdicts

coordination: 2. 4 parallel specialist passes (same diff, same context, different angle).
3. Synthesizer reads all 4 reviews; dedupes same-issue findings across specialists.
worktree_guidance: Read-only task — no worktree needed. Specialists may share the same working copy.
cost_estimate: ~$2-4 per PR (4 Sonnet parallel + 1 Opus synth).
anti_patterns: Single reviewer with all 4 lenses — misses the specialist blind spots.
Skipping synth — user drowns in 4 unconsolidated reports.
